verses.1: A Psalm or Song for the sons of Korah. His foundation is in the holy mountains.
verses.2: The LORD loveth the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob.
verses.3: Glorious things are spoken of thee, O city of God. Selah.
verses.4: I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon to them that know me: behold Philistia, and Tyre, with Cush; this man was born there.
verses.5: And of Zion it shall be said, This and that man was born in her: and the Highest himself shall establish her.
verses.6: The LORD shall count, when he writeth up the people, that this man was born there. Selah.
verses.7: As well the singers as the players on instruments shall be there : all my springs are in thee.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
